indicator: IEC and awareness raising materials diseminated

indicator: Individuals benefitting from site improvements aimed at reducing hazards (fire, flooding, cyclone eg)
primary_activity: Works to increase safety and improve dignity of site environments, with risk mitigation measures in place to respond to incidents including seasonal impacts.
Works to increase safety and improve dignity of site environments, with risk mitigation measures in place to respond to incidents including seasonal impacts.
sub_activity: Establishment of communal warming areas (Heating points) (tents or rehabilitated rooms), equipped with indirect heaters, and accompanied by community messaging campaigns on safe heating practices.

indicator: Site-level fire risk mitigation points established and maintained
primary_activity: Works to increase safety and improve dignity of site environments, with risk mitigation measures in place to respond to incidents including seasonal impacts.
sub_activity: Installation of fire safety points (extinguishers, sand drums, fire blankets, and signage) across displacement sites, with awareness sessions and training of community fire response teams.

indicator: Buildings acting as displacement sites where winterisation intervetions have taken place
primary_activity: Works to increase safety and improve dignity of site environments, with risk mitigation measures in place to respond to incidents including seasonal impacts.
sub_activity: Interventions take place in UNWRA DESs and other collected centres to make the buildings more able to withstand winter conditions, this may include sealing off areas open to elements and clearing drainage systems.
